3044750.name: Plastic Conflict
3044750.description:
A Massive Toy Soldier Real-Time Strategy Experience

Coming Summer 2026

Plastic Conflict is a large-scale real-time strategy game set in a world of toys, insects, and miniature lives locked in endless war. Command powerful factions of toy soldiers as everyday environments transform into towering battlefields.

From high-level RTS command to seamless third-person direct control, you can wage war from above — then instantly step into the boots of any unit to fight on the ground, in the air, or inside armored vehicles. Manage entire armies, pilot aircraft, lead assaults, or defend your base personally. The battlefield is always alive.

A FULL CAMPAIGN EXPERIENCE

Plastic Conflict launches with a complete, story-driven campaign featuring large-scale battles, evolving objectives, and escalating threats. Fight across multiple environments, command different unit compositions, and face intelligent AI factions that adapt to your strategies.

Every mission expands the scale of war — from backyard skirmishes to massive combined-arms conflicts.

CORE RTS GAMEPLAY — BUILD, EXPAND, CONQUER

Start from a single headquarters and grow into a dominant military force. Capture resource points, expand your base, research stronger units, and fortify your territory with bunkers and trench systems.

There is no artificial unit cap. Your army grows as large as your economy can sustain. Every match becomes a balance of expansion, defense, and aggressive pressure.

HUNDREDS OF UNITS, MULTIPLE FACTIONS & CREATURE TYPES

Plastic Conflict features a massive roster of infantry, armor, air units, and specialized roles across multiple factions.

• Riflemen, scouts, snipers, engineers, anti-tank specialists

• Tanks, APCs, troop transports

• Helicopters, fighter jets, bombers, carrier aircraft

• Paratroopers and airborne assault units

Neutral creatures — including ants, cockroaches, spiders, toads, and ravens — roam the battlefield, creating unpredictable threats. Some modes shift the focus toward full creature survival warfare.

Combined-arms strategy is essential. Infantry, armor, and air power must work together to secure victory.

DIRECT CONTROL — BECOME ANY UNIT

At any moment, switch from RTS command to direct third-person control of any unit. Drive tanks, pilot jets, man machine guns, build defenses, scout enemy lines, or personally lead assaults.

Plastic Conflict blends strategy and action into a seamless hybrid experience.

ADVANCED AI & A LIVING WARZONE

Enemy commanders actively expand, build defenses, capture territory, and adapt to threats. AI factions fight each other as well as the player, creating large-scale battles that evolve organically.

No two matches play the same.

MASSIVE TOY-SCALE MAPS

Battle across large environments designed to feel enormous from a toy’s perspective — malls, backyards, sandpits, hangars, toy cities, and more.

Hundreds of units can clash across vertical terrain, defensive networks, and dynamic frontlines.

MULTIPLAYER & LONG-FORM BATTLES

Engage in multiplayer skirmishes with up to eight factions. Mix AI and human players for chaotic large-scale warfare.

Save and continue long RTS matches at any time.

CUSTOMIZATION & PLAYER IDENTITY

Customize your army’s colors and command style to stand out on the battlefield. Multiple visually distinct factions can clash in the same match.

英语*
